answer:
\boxed{D}

The **Boeing 747-8** is the longest passenger jet among the options, with a length of **76.3 meters (247 ft)**. The Airbus A350-1000 (73.8 m) and Boeing 787-10 (68.3 m) are shorter, while the Airbus A330-200 (63.1 m) is the smallest. The 747-8’s extended fuselage makes it the clear winner in length.
